section.title: Modules
section.description: Activate or deactivate functional modules for this tenant. Disabled modules hide their pages and reject server calls without deleting any data.

toggle.error: We could not change the module state
toggle.noPermission: Only the administrator can change module activation

notActivated: This feature is not active for your tenant

copilot.label: Co-pilot
copilot.description: Tenant-scoped conversational analytics. When off, the /co-pilot page hides and the chat endpoint rejects calls.

operationsCenter.label: Operations Center
operationsCenter.description: Cross-site operational diagnostics — fiscal health, cash, inventory drift, support bundles. When off, the /operations page hides.

quotations.label: Quotations
quotations.description: Manager flow to draft, send and convert quotations. When off, the /quotations page hides and every quotations.* call returns FORBIDDEN.

anomalyDetection.label: Anomaly Detection
anomalyDetection.description: Local anomaly detector for void rate, refund amount, ticket spikes and no-sale sessions. When off, the dashboard tile hides.

semanticSearch.label: Semantic Search
semanticSearch.description: Embedding-powered product search and category suggestion. When off, the sparkles toggle on Products hides and the embedding endpoints reject calls.

posTouch.label: POS Touch surface
posTouch.description: Touch-optimized POS layout for tablets. When on, the sidebar entry appears and /touch loads the surface. ENG-039 plugs the real sales flow into the existing shell.

kds.label: KDS surface
kds.description: Fullscreen Kitchen Display Screen for kitchen staff. When on, /kds becomes reachable while /sales stays intact. ENG-039 plugs the real ticket queue.

customerDisplay.label: Customer Display
customerDisplay.description: Second-monitor cart mirror facing the customer. When on, /customer-display becomes reachable. ENG-039 plugs the real cart render.

mobileWaiter.label: Mobile Waiter
mobileWaiter.description: Phone-width layout for waitstaff taking orders at the table. When on, /m becomes reachable. ENG-039 plugs the real table flow.

eventsApi.label: Public events API
eventsApi.description: Publish public events (sale.completed, sale.refunded, inventory.adjusted, cash_session.closed, fiscal_document.accepted) to the webhook queue so a future central server or integration partner can subscribe. When off, no webhook rows are created.
